rationale: Documentation improvement about goroutine safety of Client; no spec behavior involved.
Go-specific BSON encoder missing support for interface types; no specific BSON spec rule violated.
Go-specific BSON inline field limitation with pointer structs; API behavior, no spec rule contradicted.
Performance improvement for SelectServer subscription logic; no spec rule violated.
Documentation improvement about when BulkWriteError can be returned; docs-only issue.
Documentation improvement for public types in mongo package; docs-only, no spec involvement.
Documentation improvement for IndexView with compound index examples; docs-only issue.
Go-specific Marshaller interface bug when outputting a slice at top level; internal BSON API issue.
Data race fix in test code using atomic load; test internal concurrency fix, no spec involvement.
Nil interface panic in BSON marshalling; Go-specific nil handling bug, no BSON spec rule cited.
mgocompat map codec for unmarshalling to map pointers; mgocompat compatibility feature, not spec.
Docs reference non-existent RawArray and Array types; documentation error, no spec behavior.
PasswordSet field documentation unclear; docs issue about auth option semantics, no clear spec rule violated.
User support question about partial updates using $set; resolved as Done (not a bug), no spec issue.
Heartbeat connection not closed before opened due to Go nil interface issue; implementation bug, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
SDAM error handling checks wrong type; ProcessError should classify network errors but misidentifies driver.Error with NetworkError label.
CreateIndexes never sets write concern even when configured on Database/Collection/Client; spec requires write concern propagation.
mgocompat EmptyInterfaceCodec addition; mgocompat compatibility feature, not a MongoDB spec area.
mgocompat ByteArrayCodec addition; mgocompat compatibility feature, not a MongoDB spec area.
mgocompat symbol decoding support; mgocompat compatibility feature, not a MongoDB spec area.
BulkWriteError populated with wrong request document (first instead of indexed); spec requires error to reference the failing write model.
Switch to pure Go zstd to avoid glibc dependency; build/dependency change, no spec behavior change.
Improvement to connect mongocryptd via TCP per DRIVERS-778; proactive spec rollout improvement, not a nonconformance bug.
gcc build dependency introduced by DataDog/zstd cgo; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
User reports I/O timeout on secondary; resolved as Done (not a driver bug), network/environment issue.
NewClient defers URI validation to Connect; resolved Done (not a bug), API design decision not a spec rule violation.
Cannot marshal nil bsoncore.Document value; Go-specific nil handling edge case, resolved Done, no spec rule cited.
Extended JSON writer fails to escape document keys, producing invalid JSON that cannot round-trip; BSON ExtJSON spec violation.
User support question about subdocument filtering; resolved Done (not a driver bug), MongoDB query semantics question.
API redesign to separate type encoders from hook encoders; internal API improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Request to make Session interface implementable externally for mocking; API ergonomics, not a spec conformance issue.
Docker multi-stage build connection failure due to missing DNS libraries in scratch image; environment/deployment issue.
mgocompat RespectNilValues equivalent setting; mgocompat compatibility feature, not a spec area.
CSFLE spec requires mongocryptd not be spawned when bypassAutoEncryption=true; validating this behavior per DRIVERS-787.
Documentation improvement for mgocompat compatibility layer; docs-only, no spec behavior.
RegisterTypeMapEntry for embedded document not respected; Go-specific BSON decoding registry bug, no BSON spec rule directly violated.
DNS SRV lookup fails for fully qualified names with trailing dot; DNS seedlist spec should support FQDN with trailing dot.
Data race between connection creation and topology disconnect; concurrency bug, no spec rule violated.
Enable Go 1.11 module support; build/packaging improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Session pool does not update last-use time on retrieval, causing premature expiry; sessions spec defines 30-minute idle timeout from last use.
Improve testing around default writeConcern per DRIVERS-440; test infrastructure update coordinated from parent DRIVERS ticket.
ExceededTimeLimit error should be retryable per DRIVERS-651; driver not treating it as retryable contradicts spec.
Expand error labels for retryable writes per DRIVERS-525; driver missing required error label classifications per spec.
Add error labels to WriteExceptions; depends on GODRIVER-1437 retryable writes spec expansion, implementing spec-required error labels.
Update uri_options/auth-options spec test for conditional tests per DRIVERS-785; test infrastructure update from parent coordination ticket.
Verify max set version and election id in SDAM spec tests per DRIVERS-779; test infrastructure update coordinated from DRIVERS ticket.
Add separate tlsCertificateFile and tlsKeyFile options; feature addition not contradicting existing spec requirement.
Documentation improvement: RunCommand requires order-preserving argument (bson.D not map); docs-only, resolved Done.
Pool exhausts when using cursor with limit on MongoDB 3.0.4; connection pool implementation bug, resolved Done, no specific spec rule violated.
Connection failure without +srv to Atlas; user environment/TLS issue, resolved Done, not a driver spec violation.
